entry.content: 17 000 – 25 000 PLN Azure

entry.content: 9 500 – 17 000 PLN Python

entry.content: 13 000 – 21 000 PLN Python

entry.content: 25 200 – 30 240 PLN Python

entry.content: 7 224 – 7 896 USD Node.js

entry.content: 38 000 – 42 000 PLN DevOps

entry.content: 5 000 – 7 000 EUR Java
